entry.title: Bank GL Accounts
entry.content:
Hi

 

I am using SAP S4 HANA Public cloud. I have created multiple main bank and bank clearing accounts for each of my SPV/Subsidiary, as copies of Main Bank Acct (GL 11001000) and Bank Transfer C/S (GL 11001020). However, in the newly created clearing accounts, the default SAP Main bank account (11001000) is auto assigned as the reconciliation acccount. I want to link the newly created clearing accounts to the newly created main bank GLs, but it shows the following warning when I try this:

Need some assistance with this

entry.title: MR21 and MDG
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have one question about MDG client and price update. I am trying/testing changing price using LSMW tool. I have a recording for MR21. 

When i try it in MDG, the prices are not updated and i am wondering if it is possible. i mean, if the MR21 cannot be used in MDG.

Best regards

entry.title: BCF Execution & its Impact to BW & BEx Reporting
entry.content: Currently, during the year-end BCF run, the process takes a significant amount of time, including the BW load. Given the large number of entities in ECC, the activity takes more than 15–20 days to complete along with BW load synchronization. Additionally, I am unable to complete the BCF run in a single stretch, as this results in BW data load errors. Is there a better automation option available to streamline this process and reduce the overall runtime?

entry.title: Change company code in f110 proposal
entry.content: Change company code in f110 proposal stage in AFS ecc6 based on some logic for only one company code

entry.title: FB50 Display only
entry.content:
Dear expert,

need help to set FB50 tcode from preventing user posting doc, but user can display from this menu bar

I have set the role authorization to display only (ACTVT = Display) but the user still can posting doc (save)
please help

Regards

entry.title: “In BI: Is BSEG-KOART sufficient to determine Account field, or must we map BSCHL→TBSL→KOART?”
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m trying to reproduce SAP FI document “Account” determination logic (similar to FB03 display) in an external BI/graph analytics solution (ECC).

Background / My understanding

In SAP, an accounting document is identified by the key:

BUKRS (Company Code), BELNR (Document Number), GJAHR (Fiscal Year)

And line items are stored in BSEG.

For “Account” display, my understanding of SAP’s standard concept is:

BSEG has BSCHL (Posting Key) and KOART (Account Type)

Posting Key is configured in TBSL, which also contains KOART (account type) per posting key

Then “Account” shown is chosen depending on KOART (e.g., S→HKONT, D→KUNNR, K→LIFNR, A→ANLN1, M→MATNR)

Key Question

When extracting data to BI, I already have BSEG-KOART stored in the line items.

So instead of reconstructing:
BSEG-BSCHL → join TBSL → get KOART → determine which account field to use,

Can I directly use:
BSEG-KOART (as stored) → determine account field (HKONT/KUNNR/LIFNR/ANLN1/MATNR)

In other words:

Is BSEG-KOART always the “final” account type that SAP already validated at posting time?

Are there any scenarios where relying only on BSEG-KOART could be wrong (e.g., special G/L, alternative account determination, substitutions, document splitting, etc.), such that I must re-check KOART via TBSL?

I want to confirm whether BSEG-KOART alone is sufficient for correct account selection logic in BI (to match SAP’s behavior), or if TBSL-based mapping must be applied for correctness.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: RAJABS00 - Contact your system administrator (table error) - Message no. AA833
entry.content:
RAJABS00 - Contact your system administrator (table error) - Message no. AA833

HI all, 
the business would like to prepare the annual financial statements in asset accounting – program  RAJABS00.
The program runs in test mode fine. 
In productive mode, the program  Canceled with error in SM37 - 

Contact your system administrator (table error)
Message no. AA833


Diagnosis

Depreciation area 20 has not been defined in company code xxxx.

 

Procedure

Define the depreciation area using the Customizing menu.

--> for the Company code xxxx is no depreciation area 20 maintained. 

Best regards
Thomas

entry.title: Issue Uploading Austrian Foreign Payment File pain.001.001.09 Error
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are currently testing the Austrian foreign payment file upload in the bank portal. However, the upload is failing, and we are receiving the attached error message from the bank system.

entry.title: Asset Partial Transfer ABUMN
entry.content:
Hi Team , pls help me how to fix it

  • Asset A ( Building)

    • 01.01.2025 → Acquisition EUR 1,000 (depreciation posted in 2025) (F-90)
    • Jan 2026 → Another Acquisition EUR 200  posted (wrong) (F-90)
    • January 2026 depreciation already executed                                                                                                                             However we realized that we have posted wrong asset Class . We wanted to post asset class B( Equipment) instead of asset A (Building)Then I posted Asset Partial transfer via ABUMN . Document & posting date 01.02.2026. Partial amount 200

75 Cr Old asset A  200

70 Dr  Accumulated Dep 10

70 Dr New asset B 200

75 Cr Accumulated Dep  10

When i checked the Asset explorer AW01N for Asset A . Planned accumulated depreciation is not adjusted for Feb 2025 entire 2026. it adjusted fro 2027

Asset B : not calculated Planned depreciaiton for 2026 and start depreciation calculated from 2027 .

Why SAP calculating depreciation for old asset in current year not new asset , In 2027 ,  depreciation calcualtion is correct for both assets

entry.title: How to create a Segment in Fiori?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Can anybody help me by outlining the steps to create a segment for segment reporting in Fiori? I am able to accomplish this in GUI, but I also want to be able to do it on our Fiori system.

I would be extra grateful if someone could provide the following information, specifically:

-Necessary roles

-Necessary catalogs/apps

-Step-by-step guide on segment creation

(I know how to select a segment when creating profit center master data; I just need to know how to create a new segment.)

entry.title: How to Prevent Unit Price from Being Split When Merging Documents?
entry.content:
When using the app Create Golden Tax Documents to merge multiple documents under certain materials and exchange rates, the system automatically generates only one line item, but the unit price is split across the merged items. Users may prefer to retain the original unit prices of the line items without splitting them. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Asset Clearing Account Is not Becoming Zero in Early Teremination of Lease-In Contract in SAP REFX
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm Just facing an issue regarding the asset clearing account used in the transfer in REFX.

this account comes first in posting of valuation at the first time.

Dr. Asset Clearing 10,000

Cr. Leased Liability 10,000

------------------------

Dr. ROU 10,000

Cr. Asset Clearing 10,000

 

However in early termination of asset this account doesn't come as zero balance entries i get:

Dr. Leased Liability 6,000

Cr. Asset Clearing 6,000

------------------------

Dr. Asset Clearing 4,000

Dr. Accumulated Dep 2,000

Cr. ROU 6,000

 

Numbers not real but just to show what i mean.

so can anyone tell me if this is the right conculsion or if necessary actions or entries are needed?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Discount on invoices
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to identify in the ACDOCA table when a financial or logistics invoice has discounts.
In BSEG, the KZBTR field appears, but in ACDOCA, I do not see any field that indicates that the invoice has a reduction/discount. Can you help me?

Thanks

entry.title: WHT (Withholding Tax) input when create PR (Purchase Requisition) or PO (Purchase Order)
entry.content:
Hi All FI Experts.

If we may know,
currently there is an inquiry from the end-user about the feasibility on setting-up or configuring the automatic calculation of WHT (Withholding Tax) based amount at document line-item level when parking/posting invoice using transaction code MIR7 or MIRO; by firstly having WHT Tax and WHT Code information at PO Item level since PR (Purchase Requisition)/PO (Purchase Order) creation using transaction code ME51N or ME21N.

Would you like to kindly help us on giving advice whether there is any particular technical ABAP coding using BAPI / BAdI, or relevant statement arranged in Validation GGB0, or another way needed for this requirement, please? 

Thank you so much, and we are looking forward to discussing this with you.

Ani.

 

cc @raghavendra_praveen @Priya2310 @Divyesh_Mistry  @former_member682878  @former_member183424  @JL23  @s_raghavan @former_member466170 @akshyadhingra @anss_shahid 

MM (Materials Management) FIN (Finance) MM Purchasing MM Invoice Verification SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation  SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN Posting and Taxes

entry.title: GR Cancellation/reversal issue: "Deficit of PU GR quantity xxxx DAY"
entry.content:
Hi,

When I tried to post a goods cancellation reversal (102 or 122 Movement Type), I got the error 'Deficit of PU IR quantity xxxx DAY'.

My scenario is as follows: 

Our PO has one line; we don't have stock to manage, and we have the total invoiced amount greater than the received amount. And we want to post a GR cancellation to adjust the balance. As we have the flag GR-Bsd Inv already checked, we forced the system using the transactions (OMJJ & OMBZ). We managed to bypass the control, and we reverted two lines. But the system is blocking the reversal of a new line with the new amount.

We tried with different movement type but the error message is the same: 102 & 122. 

My question is why is it not allowing me to post the goods reversal? and how to overcome this issue?

Thanks a lot for your insights and support.

MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: How to access Withholding Tax Summaries and Cumulative Reports in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community experts,

We are currently working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602 with the Colombia Localization active. We need to identify the standard Fiori applications or reports to visualize a detailed breakdown and cumulative summary of withholding taxes (Income Tax, VAT, and ICA) by tax indicator for a specific period.

Specifically, we are looking for a view that provides:

  1. Cumulative values grouped by Withholding Tax Type and Indicator.

  2. Transactional details including Journal Entries (Asientos contables), Company Code (Sociedad), and Base Amounts.

  3. Traceability from the summary down to the specific accounting document.

We have explored the Manage Withholding Tax Items (F5428) app, but it seems to be missing from our Launchpad even when searching by ID.

Our questions are:

  • What is the exact Business Role and Business Catalog required in release 2602 to access withholding tax summaries for Colombia?

  • Is the app F5428 the standard tool for this version, or has it been replaced/integrated into the Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) framework (e.g., via Run Statutory Reports - F1515)?

  • Are there any specific SSCUI configurations (like activating the Withholding Tax Reporting Date - 105376) that are mandatory to make these records visible in the reporting apps?

Any guidance on the "Best Practice" path to get a reliable tax list for reconciliation before legal submission would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards, Juan Sebastian Valencia

entry.title: Validation of Standard SAP TRM Interest Calculation vs. Daily Compounding
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some question regarding interest calculation in TRM and would appreciate your insight. 

We are validating interest calculation behavior in SAP S/4HANA TRM (Interest Rate Instruments).

Observed behavior:

  • SAP calculates interest only on the contractual principal.
  • Prior‑day accrued interest is not included in the interest calculation base unless there is an explicit principal increase / capitalization event.
  • This results in linear accrual, not true daily compounding.

Comparison:

SAP: Principal × Daily Rate × (n/360)
Lender: (Principal + Prior‑Day Accrued Interest) × Daily Rate × (n/360)

Questions:

  1. Is it correct that standard SAP TRM has no configuration option (IRI / interest calc method / condition setup) to automatically include prior‑day accrued interest in the interest base?
  2. Is SAP’s design intent to exclude accrued interest from the base for valuation and accounting consistency?
  3. When lender invoices use daily compounding, is the recommended best practice to post the variance as a P&L adjustment at settlement, rather than altering daily accruals?
  4. Would true daily capitalization require custom development or manual principal adjustments (and is that generally discouraged)?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to enable rule valuation group code for transaction FR3 via OBYC
entry.content:
Hi expert,

Do you know the reason that the setting doesn't work for the plant which don't have a specific valuation modification?

entry.title: ZUGFERD vs XRECHNUNG-B2B Customer Invoices from External System
entry.content:
Hi,

In Germany, we can exchange B2B invoices with customers in two ways.

1. via PEPPOL Network (supported via XRECHNUNG profile supported via UBL 2.1)

2. via Email (supported via ZUGFERD supported by CII)

We may have customers who wants invoice in PDF embedded with XML and other may want Invoice to be send over Peppol as pure XML XRechnung invoice. For our client 99 percent of customer invoices are generated in a non-SAP systems.

Now for a customer who opts for Peppol exchange and an invoice is created in external system and the middleware transform it to UBL 2.1 format invoice to be consumed in SAP DRC and SAP DRC creates an eDocument for it so that it can be send over Peppol to the customer, this invoice exchange happens using pure XML Rechnung profile supported by UBL 2.1 format.

Question: For a customer who wishes to have invoice via email method ,PDF (embedded with XML) ZUGFERD profile , will the middleware have to transform the invoice from non-SAP system to CII format rather than UBL 2.1 and then send it to SAP DRC to create an eDocument and then send it to the customer via eDoc_cockpit OR SAP DRC will use UBL 2.1 format to generate an XML which will be consumed by SAP DRC and then SAP convert into a format which is compatible with ZUGFERD (CII) so that it can be send over to customer via Email.

entry.title: Opening and Closing Bank Balance per Period in Indirect Cash Flow Statement
entry.content:
Hello,

We are configuring the Indirect Cash Flow Statement using a Financial Reporting Structure in SAP Business ByDesign.

The report is accessed via:

General Ledger Work Center  > Reports > Financial Statements > Select Reporting Structure (Cash Flow).

The Indirect Cash Flow Statement is created via:

Business Configuration > Overview > Financial Reporting Structures for Cost Center Management Accounting Reports >  Copy from Template > Select GB - Cash Flow Statement (Ind. Method)

Our requirement is to show the following per period within the Cash Flow statement:

  • Opening bank balance

  • Closing bank balance

  • Movement (difference between opening and closing)

Example layout:


PeriodOpening BalanceMovementClosing Balance
JanXYX + Y
FebClosing JanZClosing Jan + Z

Is it possible in SAP Business ByDesign Financial Reporting Structure / Financial Statements report to display:

  1. Opening balance per period

  2. Closing balance per period

directly within the Cash Flow statement Report?

Any guidance or recommended approach would be appreciated.

Thank you.
